data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding mode flags.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of having mode flags (off, monitor, enforced) but did not provide sufficient evidence to confirm or deny their existence. The prior steps do not include any specific checks or records related to the mode flags, leading to an inconclusive result. The lack of concrete API reads or persisted state checks directly related to the mode flags means that the requirement cannot be validated at this time.
gaps: No evidence of mode flags (off, monitor, enforced) being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence and state of mode flags.
